name: fiduciary
description: Local-first personal finance advisor — Plaid CLI + SQLite + LLM agent skills
author: weklund

requires.setup: See README.md for Plaid CLI setup and first sync

skills.name: finance-query
skills.description: Answer questions about personal finances — balances, transactions, spending patterns, account status, recent purchases, merchant history, income tracking.

skills.name: health-check
skills.description: Quarterly financial health assessment. Compares current state against goals, checks key ratios, identifies which layer of the financial pyramid needs attention, and produces a prioritized action plan.

skills.name: next-dollar
skills.description: Answer 'what should I do with my next dollar?' Apply the financial order of operations to the user's actual situation.

skills.name: onboard
skills.description: Financial advisor intake. Conducts a structured interview modeled on the CFP Board's 7-step process and writes personalized context to memory files.

skills.name: spending-audit
skills.description: Audit spending for waste, unused subscriptions, and overspending by category.

skills.name: sync-data
skills.description: Sync fresh financial data from Plaid. Pull latest transactions, update balances, rebuild the local database.

skills.name: tactics
skills.description: Optimize HOW you execute financial strategies with your specific accounts, cards, and tools. Reward maximization, balance transfers, fee elimination.

skills.name: weekly-report
skills.description: Generate a weekly personal finance report — spending summary, budget status, anomalies.
